_meta.description: Retrieval evaluation set for the docs chatbot service. Each example provides a query and one or more expected_doc_ids / expected_chunk_ids that should appear in the top-k retrieval results. Keep this file under version control. Add high-quality positive examples surfaced by analyze_chat_logs.py over time.

examples.query: Tell me about your ETL pipelines and dashboards
What is your Python and SQL experience?
How did you optimize Metabase dashboards?
What Tableau dashboards have you built?
